projects.title: Tabby — AI Bookkeeper
projects.shortDescription: All-in-one AI bookkeeping for freelancers, realtors, and small business owners.
projects.description: Tabby is your all-in-one AI-powered bookkeeping and expense tracking app — built for freelancers, realtors, 1099 contractors and small business owners. Say goodbye to manual entry and tax-time panic. Built by accountants and developers who've worked with real clients.

features.title: AI Expense Tracking
features.description: Auto-sort and categorize expenses with smart rules.

features.title: Receipt Scanning
features.description: Snap a receipt and match it to transactions instantly.

features.title: Invoices
features.description: Create branded invoices and track payments.

features.title: Cash Flow Dashboard
features.description: Real-time view of income and expenses.

features.title: P&L Reports
features.description: Tax-ready statements — no spreadsheets needed.

features.title: Simple UX
features.description: No accounting jargon, easy for anyone.

projects.title: Smart Sohay
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered exam prep for SSC, HSC, admission & job exams in Bangladesh.
projects.description: Smart Sohay is an AI-powered and data-driven app built to make exam preparation smarter, faster, and more effective for SSC, HSC (Science, Commerce, Arts), University Admission Tests, and Job Exams in Bangladesh. Designed for SSC & HSC students, university admission candidates (Medical, Engineering, IBA, Private & NU), and job exam aspirants (BCS, Bank, NTRCA, Govt & Non-Govt). Whether you're preparing for board exams, university admission, or competitive job tests, Smart Sohay helps you track, test, and transform your preparation.

features.title: Personalized Exam Practice
features.description: Custom tests based on your weak and strong topics.

features.title: AI Topic Suggestions
features.description: AI analyzes performance and suggests what to study next.

features.title: Flashcards
features.description: Quick revision with science-based flashcards for last-minute prep.

features.title: Doubt Solve with AI
features.description: Photo or text questions with instant AI-powered explanations.

features.title: Question Bank
features.description: 5 lakh+ questions filtered by board, year, chapter, and topic.

features.title: Model Tests
features.description: Full-length simulated exams with detailed analytics.

features.title: Similar Questions & AI Explanation
features.description: Related question recommendations with simple concept breakdowns.

projects.title: Muslim Minds
projects.shortDescription: Islamic lifestyle app for prayer, Quran, Qibla, and spiritual growth.
projects.description: Muslim Minds is your indispensable tool for enhancing your Islamic lifestyle and spiritual growth. Tailored for devout Muslims, it offers features to facilitate religious practices and rituals with ease and precision — from accurate Salah times to Quran recitations.

features.title: Salah Times
features.description: Accurate prayer times based on your location.

features.title: Ramadan Timings
features.description: Sehri and Iftar schedules for the holy month.

features.title: Salah Calendar
features.description: Monthly prayer calendar for daily planning.

features.title: Qibla Compass
features.description: Find the Kaaba direction anywhere in the world.

features.title: Tasbih Counter
features.description: Digital dhikr and supplication tracker.

features.title: Listen to Quran
features.description: Audio recitations from renowned Qaris on demand.

projects.title: ORCA Marine
projects.shortDescription: Intelligent SaaS platform for marine survey and ship inspection management.
projects.description: ORCA Marine is a Survey Management System — an intelligent software automation solution for marine survey and inspection. Ships and container vessels require various surveys depending on circumstances; traditionally these are conducted largely manually, creating industry-wide inefficiency. ORCA Marine is a subscription-based SaaS product by Nodes Digital for marine survey and inspection firms in Bangladesh and abroad, replacing manual workflows with a cloud-based platform that eliminates complex software and hardware overhead for clients.

features.title: Survey Management
features.description: Automate and manage multiple types of marine surveys digitally.

features.title: Ship & Container Inspections
features.description: Handle surveys for ships and container vessels based on circumstances.

features.title: Cloud SaaS Platform
features.description: Subscription-based access via the internet — no on-premise software to maintain.

features.title: Digital Workflow
features.description: Replace manual survey processes with streamlined digital operations.

features.title: Global Reach
features.description: Built for marine survey firms in Bangladesh and internationally.

features.title: Custom Solutions
features.description: Tailored configurations leveraged to each client's needs.

projects.title: We Telly-BD
projects.shortDescription: Video streaming and sharing platform for discovering and recommending content.
projects.description: We Telly-BD is a video streaming and sharing platform where users discover, watch, and recommend video content. Built with a modern dark-themed experience, it supports user authentication, personalized recommendations, category-based exploration, channel profiles, and community-driven video suggestions from platforms like YouTube.

features.title: User Authentication
features.description: Email, mobile, and social login with Google, Apple, Facebook, and Twitter.

features.title: Explore & Discover
features.description: Search and filter videos by categories, tags, and sort options.

features.title: Recommended Videos
features.description: Personalized video feed based on user interests.

features.title: Channel Profiles
features.description: Creator profiles with about info, location, and content roles.

features.title: Recommend Video
features.description: Submit YouTube URLs to suggest content to the platform.

features.title: Cross-Platform
features.description: Available on Play Store and App Store.

projects.title: Agritech
projects.shortDescription: IoT-powered smart farming app for real-time crop monitoring and precision agriculture.
projects.description: Agritech by Nodes Digital transforms traditional agriculture into a cutting-edge, data-driven, and sustainable practice. With IoT, machine learning, and advanced analytics, it delivers real-time insights, precise monitoring, and data-driven decision-making — whether you're a seasoned farmer or just starting. Boost productivity, optimize resource usage, and ensure healthy crop yields with a user-friendly companion built for farms of all sizes.

features.title: Real-Time Crop Monitoring
features.description: 24/7 sensor updates on temperature, humidity, soil moisture, water level, and EC.

features.title: Data-Driven Decisions
features.description: Actionable insights for irrigation, fertilization, and pest control.

features.title: Smart Irrigation
features.description: Precise watering based on crop needs and weather conditions.

features.title: Automated Pump Controller
features.description: Schedule irrigation automatically from real-time farm data.

features.title: Crop Health Analysis
features.description: Early detection of diseases, nutrient deficiencies, and stress factors.

features.title: Offline Support
features.description: Access critical data and insights without a stable connection.
